title: airopsis involucrata
intro: Airopsis involucrata, also known as the Leafy Airopsis, is a type of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat a variety of ailments due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Airopsis involucrata include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping its leaves and roots in hot water, or as a tincture using a solvent like ethanol or glycerin.
